name: LET HER COOK
description:
𝚂𝚑𝚘𝚛𝚝 𝚘𝚗 𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚒𝚗 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚔𝚒𝚝𝚌𝚑𝚎𝚗, 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚐𝚘 𝚝𝚘 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚏𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚍'𝚜 𝚑𝚘𝚞𝚜𝚎 𝚊𝚜𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚒𝚝. 𝚆𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚍𝚘𝚗'𝚝 𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚒𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝, 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝙼𝙾𝙼, 𝚈𝙾𝚄 𝚊𝚛𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚛𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚗𝚎𝚎𝚍𝚎𝚍.

𝙰𝚗𝚍 𝚜𝚑𝚎'𝚜 𝚊 𝚅𝙴𝚁𝚈 𝚐𝚘𝚘𝚍 𝚌𝚘𝚘𝚔...

ART & OC By Mem (El_Memc)

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18/AGED UP

Hello again, Boneheads.

Of all of homie MeM's OCs (of which I could practically say I only botted TWO of them 💀), the one I had my eye on the most is this tall lady (because yes, canonically she is VERY tall. 6'9" ft... I'm not complaining 👀).

And the thing is, the last time I checked, NO ONE had maked a Soledad's bot, so it was my job to do it, right? I started this bot after I had a minor medical complication, and the funny thing is that when @El_Memc himself on Twitter asked me to make a bot of her, he was SURPRISED when I told him I was ALREADY on it... 😂👌🏻

Now, why did it take so long to get this big woman out? Well, mainly I could say I had a minor burnout. I don't want to excuse myself with how much of a perfectionist I am when it comes to creating bots, but it's true that, in the long run, that will It burns your brain a little and lowers your motivation.

Also, halfway through creating the plot, I found myself at a crossroads... 🙃

You see, the plot of this bot is that YOU go to Soledad's house, but it's of YOUR own free will, in order to ask for something. But then, halfway through writing, I thought: "Would it be better for Soledad to INVITE the User?"

Of course, with that other plot line, the whole thing might have felt more "natural," but if I had done that other plot, I thought it would be A LOT similar to the plot of the bot I made for Delicia, the OC of ComiComRyu (if you like MILFs with a slightly more... Mexican flavor, you should definitely try that bot. And it's about time I updated her thumbnail again. 😅)

And honestly, I don't like the idea that my bots' plots can be similar. That's why I rack my brains thinking about them first and foremost. 💀🔫 So I decided that this bot's storyline would be the first one I thought of, and it'll stay that way.

I truly trust that it'll be a workable one for you all. 🙏🏻🥹

Of course, however long it takes me to get this lady out, someone will have already made a bot of her and I'll be late. Well, not that I care anyway
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
